name: anthropic-api-tool-dispatch
description: Anthropic API tool use: detecting when the model has called a tool and dispatching tool execution correctly. TRIGGER when: implementing tool dispatch in a streaming API loop, when debugging tool calls that are silently missed, or when a team member asks why stop_reason should not be used as the tool-dispatch signal. Load when writing any code that processes streaming responses for tool use.
author: Anthropic
